series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains original certificates evidencing an OSHP sworn employee''s successful completion of training to use breathalyzers to measure blood alcohol content (BAC).

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Length of service, . initial and all renewal certificates in office files at employee''s assigned post or district length of service. Upon employee''s separation, forward certificates DPS HCM be retained full retention period elapses
